message:
perf: Optimize HashMap encoder to O(n²) with skip array (still 33x slower)

Optimization:
- Replaced O(n) array shifting with skip array
- Mark merged positions instead of shifting
- Compact at end in single pass
- From O(n³) to O(n²)

Results:
- Correctness: 594/594 (100%) ✅
- Speed: 14.7s vs rs-bpe 445ms (still 33x slower) ❌

Why still slow:
- Still O(n²): scan all pairs O(n) × apply O(n) merges
- Called 30,000 times (once per chunk from regex splitting)
- Total: 30k × O(n²) = very slow

Real solution needed:
- rs-bpe uses encode_via_backtracking (greedy+backtrack)
- But backtracking needs Aho-Corasick for pattern matching
- OR use heap/priority queue for O(n log n) merging
